base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pokedex_151_kanto — a character from 1996 pokemon red blue. Gen-1 Kanto Pokedex — 151 Pokemon with front+back battle sprites × shiny palette. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Gen-1 Kanto Pokedex — 151 Pokemon with front+back battle sprites × shiny palette
